guide_crossdevice_web_li3: Click the ⚙ Cross-Device Msg button to expand the settings panel
guide_crossdevice_web_li4: Fill in forbidden words, blacklist/whitelist, rate limit, etc.
guide_crossdevice_uc1_desc: Set forbidden words to filter inappropriate content, enable rate limiting to prevent message flooding, and blacklist malicious users permanently.
guide_crossdevice_uc2_desc: Enable whitelist mode to allow only specific client Public Codes to access your agent, creating an exclusive VIP channel.
guide_crossdevice_uc3_desc: Use pre-inject to automatically prepend role prompts before every external message, e.g., 'You are a travel advisor, reply in a friendly tone.'
guide_crossdevice_tip_li1: ✅ Start loose, tighten later: Begin with defaults and gradually add restrictions as needed
guide_crossdevice_tip_li2: ✅ Use pre-inject wisely: Give your Bot full role context with every incoming message
guide_crossdevice_tip_li3: ✅ Set a reject message: More user-friendly than silent rejection — let blocked users know why
guide_crossdevice_tip_li4: ✅ Pair with Card Holder: Blocking someone in Card Holder acts as the first gate check
guide_voice_scene1_desc: An e-commerce support Bot replies with text and simultaneously broadcasts key information via TTS. \"Your order has shipped and is expected to arrive tomorrow.\" Users can receive info without staring at the screen.
guide_voice_scene2_desc: Combine with voice input for a full voice conversation experience. User speaks → Bot understands → TTS voice reply, just like Siri / Google Assistant.
guide_voice_scene3_desc: Visually impaired users can receive all Bot replies via voice. Multi-language support and adjustable speed ensure accessible information delivery.
guide_voice_scene4_desc: Supports Traditional Chinese / English / Japanese / Korean / Thai and more. Ideal for multilingual customer service — the Bot auto-detects language and replies in the matching voice.
guide_voice_feat1: 📱 Background Playback: Voice plays even when the App is in the background or screen is locked (Foreground Service)
